title: ICUBE-Q Lunar Mission
shortDescription: Pakistan's lunar CubeSat mission launched aboard Chang'e-6. Served as one of three Principal Investigators and contributed to mission-oriented execution, payload integration, and national visibility in lunar small-satellite capability.
description: ICUBE-Q is Pakistan's lunar CubeSat mission launched aboard Chang'e-6. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as one of three Principal Investigators, contributing to mission-oriented execution, payload integration, and national visibility in lunar small-satellite capability.
partners: China National Space Administration, Chang'e-6 mission

sections.title: Mission Overview
sections.content: Pakistan's lunar CubeSat mission launched aboard Chang'e-6. Served as one of three Principal Investigators and contributed to mission-oriented execution, payload integration, and national visibility in lunar small-satellite capability.

title: SSS-2A
shortDescription: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A developed with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Served as the Pakistan-side technical expert / lead in areas linked to EPS, communications, and systems coordination.
description: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A developed with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as the Pakistan-side technical expert / lead in areas linked to EPS, communications, and systems coordination.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: SSS-2A is APSCO's Student Small Satellite-2A, developed collaboratively with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. As the Pakistan-side technical expert and lead, Dr. Rehan Mahmood contributed in areas linked to EPS, communications, and systems coordination. The program advances student satellite capabilities across the APSCO region.

title: ICUBE-N
shortDescription: Project Director for the National CubeSat of Pakistan, with current emphasis on nanosatellite architecture and subsystem capability building.
description: Project Director for the National CubeSat of Pakistan, with current emphasis on nanosatellite architecture and subsystem capability building.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-N is Pakistan's National CubeSat program. Dr. Rehan Mahmood serves as Project Director, with current emphasis on nanosatellite architecture and subsystem capability building.

title: ICUBE-1
shortDescription: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Worked on project management, subsystem analysis, software, testing, launch campaign participation, and post-launch operations.
description: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Dr. Rehan Mahmood worked on project management, subsystem analysis, software, testing, launch campaign participation, and post-launch operations.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-1 was Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Dr. Rehan Mahmood worked on project management, subsystem analysis, software, testing, launch campaign participation, and post-launch operations, establishing foundational credibility for subsequent ICUBE missions.

title: NGN/NTN–PPDR Simulator
shortDescription: Digital-twin and scenario-evaluation platform for resilient communications across terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks. Operator-facing KPI workflows, visual mock interfaces, and future policy-simulation direction.
description: NGN/NTN–PPDR scenario evaluation, digital-twin-driven analysis of resilient communications, and development of visual mock interfaces for operator-facing workflows. Includes integrated terrestrial/non-terrestrial communication scenarios, KPI-oriented analysis, and future policy-simulation direction.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The NGN/NTN–PPDR simulator explores resilient public-protection and disaster-relief communication environments across terrestrial and non-terrestrial network architectures. Emphasis on scenario evaluation, operator-facing insight, architecture understanding, and future visual decision-support workflows. A simplified visual interface is planned to demonstrate mock telecom-space workflows. A related future direction is a mock-data policy simulation layer for PPDR-relevant decision environments.

title: KidSat
shortDescription: Directed classroom satellite and STEM initiatives designed to bring mission-based space engineering into education.
description: Directed classroom satellite and STEM initiatives designed to bring mission-based space engineering into education.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: KidSat and related classroom satellite initiatives bring mission-based space engineering into education, engaging young students in satellite technology and space science through hands-on activities.

title: ICUBE-CSAT
shortDescription: Directed classroom satellite and STEM initiatives in the ICUBE program series.
description: CubeSat in the ICUBE program series, contributing to mission-based space engineering and STEM capability development.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-CSAT contributes to the broader ICUBE program objectives and mission-based space engineering education.
